description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and a prominent rectangular cutout in the center, possibly for a skylight or open courtyard. The structure is elevated above a tiled platform, with a spiral staircase providing access from the ground level to the main floor. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, contrasting with the darker, textured base. A sleek railing runs along one side of the cutout, adding a touch of safety and style. The overall form is geometric and streamlined, with clean lines and a focus on functional simplicity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a central cutout, spiral staircase, and minimalist design on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiral staircase leading up to the main floor and the central cutout with a railing.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated rectangular shape and the open cutout in the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid wall base and the continuation of the flat roof with the cutout visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the staircase from above and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the structure.
